narrative:
Painesville municipal court district has 60,777 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.4% D−R vs -10.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
